Home.description: Drop your Chess.com or Lichess username and instantly unlock your stats, ratings and full game history - then run a <stockfish>Stockfish game review</stockfish> on any match, move by move.
Home.featureProfileBody: Avatar, title, country, league, followers and join date.
Home.featureRatingsBody: Bullet, blitz, rapid and daily ratings with peak highs.
Home.featureReviewBody: Step through any game. Every move graded Best to Blunder.
Home.step2Body: ChessDeeper calls the official public API.
Home.step3Body: Explore your dashboard and replay any game.

Footer.description: A reader for the Chess.com public API. ChessDeeper is an independent project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Chess.com.
